calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Clifford Y. Wang, appearing for Petitioners. Father of Minor Edward Chi-Shun Chung and mother Helen MiaoLing Cheng sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Clifford Y. Wang.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Connie Cheng to Connie Hope Cheng, and Amanda Cheng to Amanda Tiffany Cheng.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
